title: Manasukkul Oru Puyal Lyrics Star
stanzas:
Manasukkul oru puyal
maiyam kondathe
athan peyarthaan enna

puyalukku kadhal endru
peyar solgindraar
adutha nilaithaan enna

indha puyal indru
karai kadanthaal
innum ennenna aagum
ennenna aagum

Manasukkul oru puyal
maiyam kondathe
athan peyarthaan enna

indha puyal indru
karai kadanthaal
innum ennenna aagum
ennenna aagum

Moochu vidavum
marandhuvitten
enakendru peyar illai
anbae en udal illai
engae en uyir illai
uyire

enna pudhumai
thookkam en idakkannil
kanaa en valakannil
nijamaa

moongilukkul udaikindra
kaatru mukthi petru
thirumbuthal pole
un madiyil sollaai
vilundhavan kaviyaai
mulaithaen
un ponmadi vazhga

Manasukkul oru puyal
maiyam kondathe
athan peyarthaan enna

indha puyal indru
karai kadanthaal
innum ennenna aagum
ennenna aagum

Maerkil pona paravai ondru
Maerkil pona paravai ondru
May mathathil enakoru
kanni pen varum endru
kadhil panpaadi vittu sendradhu

enna viyappu andha paadal
pan thaeyum munne
kanne en kangal
unnai kandadhu

un marbin mayyathil
enakoru kudisai poatu
naan vazhndhida vendum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Manasukkul Oru Puyal'?

The song conveys the feelings of love and the emotional turmoil that comes with it, likening love to a storm within the heart.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Star'?

In the movie, this song reflects the protagonist's inner feelings and struggles related to love and relationships.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Sadhana Sargam and SPB.

Who composed the music for 'Manasukkul Oru Puyal'?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 17, 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Manasukkul Oru Puyal', the song encapsulates the emotional journey of love, portraying the turbulence and beauty that comes with it. The lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, evoke a sense of longing and introspection, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love's highs and lows. The harmonious blend of Sadhana Sargam and SPB's voices, coupled with AR Rahman's soulful composition, creates a soothing atmosphere. This song is a perfect choice for romantic occasions, resonating deeply with listeners and leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Manasukkul Oru Puyal from Star is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Sadhana Sargam and SPB, paired with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical brilliance that makes this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: In my heart, there is a storm, what does it mean?
They say love is called a storm, what does it mean for the next moon?
If this storm crosses the shore today, what will happen, what will happen?
The universe is in the flower, the universe is in the flower.
In my heart, there is a storm, what does it mean?
If this storm crosses the shore today, what will happen, what will happen?
I have forgotten to open my eyes.
I have forgotten to open my eyes, there is no name for me, my love, my body is not here, where is my life, my life?
What a new surprise, in my left eye, is it real in my right eye?
Like a breeze that breaks through the bamboo, I have become a poet who speaks in your lap, may your golden lap flourish.
In my heart, there is a storm, what does it mean?
If this storm crosses the shore today, what will happen, what will happen?
A bird that has flown away, a bird that has flown away, in May, a virgin girl will come to me, this is what the song says.
What a surprise, that song, before my eyes, I saw you.
In the spring, I saw a flower bloom, in the autumn, I saw another flower bloom.
In your heart, I need a place to live.
